title: Front Office Manager - Sapphire Foods India Ventures Solutions - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Sapphire Foods India Ventures Solutions - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Front Office Manager with drive and ambition, Sapphire Foods India Ventures Solutions in Bengaluru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Sapphire Foods India Ventures Solutions:
Sapphire Foods India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sapphire Foods India Ventures Solutions!
